pokemon:flamigo.name: Flamigo
pokemon:flamigo.summary: This Pokémon apparently ties the base of its neck into a knot so that energy stored in its belly does not escape from its beak.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: This Pokémon apparently ties the base of its neck into a knot so that energy stored in its belly does not escape from its beak.
Thanks to a behavior of theirs known as “synchronizing,” an entire flock of these Pokémon can attack simultaneously in perfect harmony.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: This Pokémon apparently ties the base of its neck into a knot so that energy stored in its belly does not escape from its beak.

form:flamigo.name: Flamigo
form:flamigo.summary: Flamigo form with Flying / Fighting typing.
expansionNotes: Location and breeding metadata can be expanded with a fuller encounter import.
